title: rubus × informis var. semistiriacus
intro: Rubus × informis var. semistiriacus is a hybrid thimbleberry plant, derived from the combination of the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus armeniacus). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × informis var. semistiriacus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the leaves and stems typically used in herbal preparations.
